jd_text: Overview A specialist global investment manager is seeking a Head of Business Development for the Middle East to lead institutional fundraising and strategic client engagement across the region. This is a senior leadership role with responsibility for driving capital raising, strengthening long-term institutional relationships, and expanding the firm’s presence with sovereign wealth funds, pensions, insurers, endowments, and large family offices across the GCC. The role combines hands-on fundraising with regional strategy ownership, working closely with the CEO and global distribution teams. Key Responsibilities Lead institutional fundraising efforts across the Middle East for existing and future investment strategies Originate and convert new institutional relationships while deepening existing partnerships Develop and execute a clear regional distribution strategy aligned with firm-wide objectives Act as the primary senior point of contact for sovereign wealth funds, pension funds, insurers, and large family offices Manage complex, long-cycle institutional sales processes, including RFPs, due diligence, and mandate negotiations Deliver high-quality client presentations alongside portfolio managers and investment teams Partner closely with investment teams to position strategies effectively for institutional audiences Provide market intelligence and investor feedback to inform product development and fund structuring Collaborate with global distribution, marketing, and client service teams to ensure consistent messaging Represent the firm at regional industry events, conferences, and investor forums Strengthen the firm’s institutional brand and long-term positioning across the Middle East Candidate Profile Extensive experience in institutional business development or fundraising within asset management Strong network across Middle Eastern institutional investors, particularly within the GCC Deep understanding of public and/or private market investment strategies and institutional allocation processes Proven ability to lead senior-level investor conversations and close large, complex mandates Entrepreneurial mindset with the credibility to operate as a regional figurehead Why This Role Opportunity to lead and scale Middle East institutional distribution for a highly regarded specialist investment manager Very senior position, working in partnership with the CEO to grow the business New fund launches this year Long-term capital base and differentiated investment offering Ability to shape the firm’s institutional footprint across one of the world’s most important allocator regions
